FrequencyType.description: Defines how often clients are charged. Possible values are: * SetNumberOfAutopays * MonthToMonth

FrequencyValue.description: The interval of AutoPay frequency, combined with `FrequencyTimeUnit`. This value is null if `FrequencyType` is `MonthToMonth`.

FrequencyTimeUnit.description: Defines the time unit that sets how often to run the AutoPay, combined with `FrequencyValue`. This value is null if `FrequencyType` is `MonthToMonth`. Possible values are: * Weekly * Monthly * Yearly
